questions.q: What has a recent analysis published in Economic Modeling associated with the enactment of cannabis legalization laws?
options: No significant change in public safety
questions.correctText: A recent analysis has associated the enactment of cannabis legalization laws with declining crime rates.

questions.q: Which plastic chemicals have been linked to millions of preterm births and thousands of infant deaths worldwide in a recent study?
questions.correctText: A new study has linked phthalates, specifically DEHP and DiNP, to millions of preterm births and thousands of infant deaths.

questions.q: According to a recent twin study, what factors primarily explain the link between higher formal education and lower scores on right-wing authoritarianism?
questions.correctText: A twin study reveals that most of the link between higher formal education and lower scores on right-wing authoritarianism is explained by childhood environments and genetics.

questions.q: What type of event did a Starlink satellite experience recently, resulting in it breaking apart into 'tens of objects'?
questions.correctText: A Starlink satellite experienced an 'anomaly on-orbit' resulting in it breaking apart into 'tens of objects', with SpaceX confirming the event as a 'fragment creation event'.

questions.q: A recent study has linked childhood trauma to an elevated risk of what in old age?
questions.correctText: Childhood trauma has been linked to an elevated risk of simultaneous physical and mental illness in old age, predicting the later coexistence of chronic physical diseases and clinical depression.
